{'sql': 'SELECT 
    s.Name AS stadium_name,
    s.Capacity,
    COUNT(c.concert_ID) AS concert_count
FROM 
    stadium s
LEFT JOIN 
    concert c ON s.Stadium_ID = c.Stadium_ID AND CAST(c.Year AS INTEGER) >= 2014
GROUP BY 
    s.Stadium_ID, s.Name, s.Capacity
ORDER BY 
    concert_count DESC
LIMIT 1;'}

    s.Name AS stadium_name,
    s.Capacity,
    COUNT(c.concert_ID) AS concert_count
FROM 
    stadium s
LEFT JOIN 
    concert c ON s.Stadium_ID = c.Stadium_ID AND CAST(c.Year AS INTEGER) >= 2014
GROUP BY 
    s.Stadium_ID, s.Name, s.Capacity
ORDER BY 
    concert_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

    s.Name AS stadium_name,
    s.Capacity,

    stadium s

    s.Stadium_ID, s.Name, s.Capacity

    concert_count DESC
LIMIT 1;'}

final.final_sql:
SELECT 
    s.Name AS stadium_name,
    s.Capacity,
    COUNT(c.concert_ID) AS concert_count
FROM 
    stadium s
LEFT JOIN 
    concert c ON s.Stadium_ID = c.Stadium_ID AND CAST(c.Year AS INTEGER) >= 2014
GROUP BY 
    s.Stadium_ID, s.Name, s.Capacity
ORDER BY 
    concert_count DESC
LIMIT 1;
